description_long: This object is a professional lighting or audio control console, featuring a wide, rectangular base with an array of physical controls including sliders, rotary knobs, buttons, and illuminated touch-sensitive pads. The upper section houses two large, high-resolution digital display screens, which are slightly angled for optimal visibility and show complex graphical user interfaces. The control surface is densely populated with tactile elements, including color-coded faders, backlit buttons, and a prominent jog wheel with a glowing LED ring. The chassis is constructed from dark, matte-finished metal or high-grade plastic, giving it a robust and modern appearance. Ports and connectors are likely present on the rear panel for integration with other professional equipment. This device is typically used in environments such as broadcast studios, live event venues, or control rooms.
description: A professional control console with dual digital screens, numerous sliders, buttons, and a large illuminated jog wheel, designed for technical operations in studios or event spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual display screens, full array of sliders, buttons, and the illuminated jog wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled screens and the depth of the control surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panel, likely where ports and connectors are located, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side profile of the screens and the arrangement of controls on the surface.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, sliders, rotary knobs, jog wheel, touchscreen
